text:
Created attachment 243044
security/py-pycryptodome{,x}: Update to 3.18.0

Changelog
=========

*   Update to 3.18.0


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport on 13.2-RELEASE amd64 w/py37 [0], py38, py39, py310 (default), and py311 
SelfTest: OK -- test suite passes with security/py-pycryptodome-test-vectors 1.0.10 or 1.0.12 on all versions of Python in the ports tree

[0] Yes, I know lang/python37 expires today, but it wasn't expired when I ran the tests.

Note
====

Updating this port also updates security/py-cryptodomex
